auth.notLinked:
To get started, link your account:

1. Go to aineron.net
2. Account → Telegram → Connect

All features will be available once linked.
auth.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a minute and try again.

menu.chatBody:
Ask a question or a task — the AI will reply.

For a new conversation: /newchat
menu.imageBody: Describe the image with a command: /image sunset over the sea, anime style
menu.helpBody: Chat & generation Ask any question — the AI will reply. /image <description> — generate an image Controls /models — choose an AI model /balance — balance and top-up /settings — settings /language — change bot language /newchat — start a new conversation Top up your balance: aineron.net/account/billing/

start.dashboardHint: Type a question or pick a section from the menu.
start.promptLoading: Loading the prompt, type your request!
start.refApplied: Referral code applied. To get started, link your account: 1. Go to aineron.net 2. Account → Telegram → Connect 3. Come back here via the link
start.linkInvalidBody: This link has expired or was already used. Go to aineron.net → Account → Telegram to get a new link.
start.introBody: An AI platform: GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini and other models. To get started: 1. Go to aineron.net 2. Account → Telegram → Connect 3. Come back here via the link Once linked, you'll have access to all models and your balance.

onboarding.title: Choose a model
onboarding.chooseModel: Pick a default model for chat. You can change it anytime in Settings.
onboarding.readyQuestion: Ask your first question — I'm ready.
onboarding.doneBody: You can pick a model anytime via Settings → Change model. Ask your first question!

settings.title: Aineron · Settings
settings.sendNewPrompt: Send a new prompt or /cancel to abort.

language.title: Language
language.subtitle: Choose the language for bot messages. Automatic follows your Telegram app language.

models.tabOpenFailed: Couldn't open the tab. Try /models again.

images.title: Aineron · Image
images.example: /image sunset over the sea, anime style
images.notFound: Image generated but not found. Check /account/files/
images.error: Generation failed. Please try later — your balance has been refunded.

chat.noModels: No models available. Please contact support.
chat.newChatStarted: New conversation started. Ask your first question.
chat.dislikeHint: [The previous reply wasn't good enough. Answer in more detail and more precisely.]
